infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AsthmiCare needs your location to show local weather and air quality data for asthma management.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow AsthmiCare to access your location for local weather and air quality data to help manage your asthma.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow AsthmiCare to use your location to show you local weather conditions.
